title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 86.033 - Voting — quorum
text:
86.033.  Voting — quorum. — Each trustee shall be entitled to one vote in the board.  Four votes shall be necessary for a decision by the trustees at any meeting of said board.
(RSMo 1939 § 9468, A.L. 1947 V. I p. 418) 
Prior revision: 1929 § 8910
